about.title: About i-muslim
about.description: An all-in-one Islamic companion for the modern Muslim.
about.p1: i-muslim is a free, ad-free Islamic companion. We bring the daily essentials — Prayer Times, Qibla, Quran, Hadith, the Hijri calendar, Zakat, mosque directory, halal businesses, and the matrimonial — into one calm, fast experience.
about.p2: Sacred content is rendered faithfully. Quran text and translations come from quran.com; hadith collections come from open community sources. We do not paraphrase or silently truncate.
about.p3: We're built by Muslims for Muslims, with the niyyah of making it easier to read, pray, and connect. May Allah accept it from us and from you.
about.credits: Quran text & translations by <quran>quran.com</quran>; hadith by <hadith>fawazahmed0/hadith-api</hadith>.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: What data i-muslim collects and how we use it.
privacy.p1: We collect the minimum needed to run the features you use — and nothing more.
privacy.p2: Prayer Times, Qibla, and Mosques near me ask for your location only when you tap them. Coordinates stay in your browser and are sent only to the calculation libraries that produce times or distances. We do not store them on our servers.
privacy.p3: Sign-in is required only for the matrimonial profile, event RSVPs, and submitting mosques or businesses. We use Firebase Authentication. We store your email, display name, and the data you enter on your profile.
privacy.p4: We do not run third-party advertising trackers. We do not sell your data. We do not have a Facebook pixel or similar.
privacy.p5: Questions, deletion requests, or anything privacy-related: email us at the address on the <contact>contact</contact> page.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.description: The basic terms for using i-muslim.
terms.p1: By using i-muslim you accept these terms. They are short by design.
terms.p2: i-muslim is provided as-is, with no warranty. Prayer-time and Qibla calculations are best-effort and depend on the method and coordinates you choose. Always cross-check with your local mosque for matters of worship.
terms.p3: We render Quran and hadith faithfully. If you spot a transcription or translation error, please report it.
terms.p4: The matrimonial, mosque directory, and business directory are community spaces. Be honest. Be respectful. Don't impersonate others or post misleading information. We may suspend accounts that abuse these spaces.
terms.p5: We may update these terms as the app grows. Significant changes will be noted on this page.
terms.p6: The zakat calculator converts your assets using currency rates from open.er-api.com and gold/silver spot prices from metals.dev. Both feeds refresh about once an hour and may lag the live market. The resulting nisab threshold and zakat amount are best-effort estimates — verify with a scholar and your local bullion market before paying.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Send us a message — we read every one.
contact.intro: Have a question, feedback, or a takedown request? Use the form below and we'll reply by email.
contact.directoryNote: For directory issues — an outdated mosque listing, a closed halal business, or a problem with a matrimonial profile — please use the per-listing report flow on that page. It reaches us faster and includes the relevant context.

languages.title: Languages
languages.description: Choose which languages are visible to visitors. Disabled languages disappear from public switchers, but existing URLs keep working.
languages.uiDescription: Languages users can pick for the app interface. Activate a reserved locale by uploading a translations JSON; once activated, toggle it on to expose it in the public switcher.
languages.quranDescription: Languages available as translations on /quran/* pages. Arabic is always shown as the original. Run the per-language seed script to populate text before enabling a new language.
languages.hadithDescription: Languages available as translations on /hadith/* pages. Arabic is always shown as the original. Hadith collections without a native edition fall back to English at render time.

activate.title: Activate locale
activate.description: Provide display info and a translations JSON. Missing keys fall back to the base locale automatically.
activate.englishNameHint: Used internally and in admin labels.
activate.flagHint: Emoji shown next to the name.
activate.baseLocaleHint: Used as a fallback for missing keys.
activate.messagesHint: Same shape as messages/en.json — paste your translated tree. Partial uploads are OK.
activate.downloadBaseHint: Click "Download {locale}" to grab the latest base translations, translate offline, and paste the result above.
activate.errorMissingFields: Native name, English name, and flag are required.
activate.errorParse: Translations JSON is not valid JSON
activate.errorNotObject: Translations must be a JSON object at the top level.

content.toggleHint: When off, the language is hidden from the public translation switcher even if some entries are translated.
content.seedCommandHint: Run this in your terminal to fetch and store the missing translations from the upstream source. Re-running is idempotent.

editor.title: Edit translations
editor.description: Edit phrase-by-phrase. Each row shows the base value above and the current translation below. Untranslated rows still mirror the base — change them to mark progress.
editor.saveChanges: Save {count, plural, one {# change} other {# changes}}
